Alright, welcome to section 10. This is the product reveal. And whenever I teach this, I really like equating the product reveal to that suspended moment when a bride emerges at the top of the aisle, you know, especially from the husband to be's perspective. Because there's been all this buildup, so much promise and excitement for a new reality. We're about to partner on together. And all of that emotion collapses into that single moment when you're given this chance to exit your old world and step into a new one. And the other part of the analogy that I really appreciate is that just like the husband and wife to be, the decision to get married was made months or even years ago, unless it's a whole drunken Vegas thing and no judgment there, but it's the same thing here with your product. You got that buy-in, that commitment about a thousand words ago. You know, you promised a new reality and more importantly, you got commitment on it. So now it's just time to go through the formalities to make good on that commitment to a new reality within the context of the official offer and product that satisfies it. So at a high level, what you're coaching is alignment between the big promise and your product. So to move it away from the marriage context and bring it back to the coaching, the conversion one, what you're coaching here is alignment between that big promise in your product. Whereas the promises were made and reinforced before without the product, we now place those same promises and agreements within the context of the offer. And the thing is they have to match. You can't just promise this new reality, get buy-in and commitment on it, and then offer a product that doesn't satisfy it. So right from the beginning before your product makes its full appearance, that initial reveal has to create that alignment between the big promise and your product. There also has to be alignment between those belief shifts and your product. That connection has to be super clear. Your product, its features, and the benefits it produces have to match and satisfy all those things you set up earlier with your sacred cows and belief installation. And remember, you've already earned buy-in on those belief shifts. You've built that Blue Ocean bridge leading to your product, but unless your product is in full alignment with that, that bridge is just going to collapse under the weight of your prospect's doubt and skepticism. So we need to coach alignment between the product and the belief shifts that satisfies. And finally, we're coaching the recognition of your product as the escape door to the moment of highest tension and bleeding neck pain points. So really making it unequivocally clear that your product is that escape door to that moment of highest tension that they no longer want to be experiencing. And once you add your product to the mix, you've got to accept the fact that there's going to be increased friction and nerves, not unlike our bride and groom above who've had months to chill out and now feel the nerves on this day. So you want to counter those nerves and the resistance and the friction it brings up by reminding them of that moment of highest tension and showing how it is way worse to stay stuck in there than to bite the bullet, face the nerves, and enter this new reality that is literally right in front of them. Cool. So with all that said, here is a quick template you can use to take everything we just wrote and execute it in a simple way. Version one, you are going to introduce your product name. You are going to summarize the big promise in one or two sentences. You're going to create tension and contrast with the bleeding neck pain points and you're going to repeat the promise or the vow if you want to go back to that wedding metaphor. So let's take a quick look to see how this plays out. So back to Amy's List Builders Lab. Introducing List Builders Lab 2.0. So introducing the product. The most advanced what's working now list building system that guarantees you grow your business's most important asset every single day by leveraging only the most powerful up to date tools and strategies. So there's your summary of the big promise in one or two sentences. I've invested the last 12 months working in the trenches with your fellow online business owners and now we're going to get into those moment of highest tension bleeding neck pain points. Entrepreneurs who've struggled to gain traction with their list building efforts no matter how many epic posts they write, how many podcast episodes they produce, or how many dollars they throw at Zuckerberg hoping he'll throw some traffic their way. Entrepreneurs tired of wasting precious time and energy getting overwhelmed with outdated methods and may have worked in 2015 but now act as subscriber repelling. Entrepreneurs who despite taking course after course have failed to gain traction on what they know is their business's most foundational area of growth. And entrepreneurs who despite the temporary setbacks recognize that there's still no getting around this list building thing and are therefore still motivated to as heck to finally achieve the momentum and growth they know they need. The result is an easy to follow three step list building stacking method that gives you a crystal clear can fail roadmap for predictably growing, scaling, and cashing in on your business's most important asset. So there's that promise repeated at the end of it. Now a second version I want to leave you with is similar but it just attacks in a different way. So you're also going to introduce your product name, summarize the big promise in one or two sentences, and then you're going to actually use this high level how, you know, showing how your product aligns with those beliefs you installed and that Blue Ocean bridge. So this is how version two of the product reveal plays out in 10x launches. So introducing 10x launches 10x launches is the first copywriting program fully avenue to speed up your execution and amplify your results no matter what kind of funnel or launch strategy you're rolling out. So there's a promise it's built not only for best in class copywriters but for coaches, consultants, course creators, and anyone who stands to benefit from nailing down their launch or funnel copy faster with more genuine impact. And now we're getting into the how that aligns with those beliefs. So three ways 10x launches will make your iPhone blink up with sales notifications. Two core modules that introduce in full detail the coaching the conversion method as well as how to leverage a new more empowering definition of direct response that opens up the floodgates to greater intimacy, empathy, and sales. Five launch modules breaking down every single phase of your launch or funnel in full detail, including some you didn't even know existed. You learn exactly what's at play during the segmentation and confirmation pre-launch launch sales and closing phases of your funnel and how to quickly craft and messaging the coaches your prospect into the final conversion in a powerful non-sleazy way. And then the third part of that how aligns with the belief we installed on this sales page which was about writing having to be fast but not this swipey over templated thing. So none of that BS plug and play or swipe and deploy stuff that shoe horns your message into lifeless boxes that rob it of all life and power. Instead you'll get full breakdowns and walkthroughs of the of the go to theme plates that turned you over and over again to consistently produce six and seven figure launch campaigns. Meaning you get to bang out your own high converting launch emails in about 25 minutes flat and fire them into convert kit or whatever you're using so you can make sales while your coffee's still hot. So these big house actually give us a chance to give some very high level features of the product and tie those features to the beliefs we set up earlier in that sales page. So with those two examples in mind choose one of them that you feel represents your product best and then give it the product reveal that it deserves and I'll see you in the next lesson.
